creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
I found a .parentlock file: 

% ls -ahl /tmp/zotero_grahamperrin/
total 1
drwx------   2 grahamperrin  wheel    64B  5 Nov 01:32 .
drwxrwxrwt  16 root          wheel   2.0K  5 Nov 04:09 ..
-rw-r--r--   1 grahamperrin  wheel     0B  5 Nov 01:27 .parentlock
% rm -r /tmp/zotero_grahamperrin/
% 

No improvement after removing the temporary directory.
